prompt: Professional medical illustration: Futuristic digital brain cross-section (axial view) showing subarachnoid hemorrhage as a red blood volume in the center. Above the brain, display THREE wireframe cubes with labels: LEFT cube '8.2 mL' (small), MIDDLE cube '2.5 mL' (tiny), RIGHT cube '16.7 mL' (TWICE the size of the left cube). Modern CT scanner on the left edge. Global network connections radiating outward to hospital building icons across continents. Title text 'SUBARACHNOID HEMORRHAGE BLOOD VOLUME' at top. Clean medical aesthetic: deep blues, whites, subtle red blood. Scientific, precise, high-end medical journal style. NO other numbers or text except the three cube labels.
